'''鈭歾h-th-v-f''' ('''kazhathvefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ruler|ruler]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-th-v-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ruler|ruler]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-th-v-f
|-
! Lemma
| kazhathvefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhathvefoko|thizhathvefoko]] || [[word:jizhathvefoko|jizhathvefoko]] || [[word:shizhathvefoko|shizhathvefoko]] || [[word:kizhathvefoko|kizhathvefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
